items.title: Four children stabbed to death at Ugandan school
items.dek: The suspect is in custody but his motive is unknown, the police say in a brief statement.

items.title: Iranian Nobel laureate suffered suspected heart attack in prison, family says
items.dek: Narges Mohammadi's brother says he fears her life is in imminent danger and she needs to be transferred to a hospital.
